tabfm 0.1.0

tabfm: R Interface to 'TabFM', a Zero-Shot Foundation Model for Tabular Data

Source: R/tabfm-package.R
tabfm-package.Rd

A thin wrapper around the 'TabFM' 'Python' package from Google Research (https://github.com/google-research/tabfm). Provides zero-shot classification and regression on tabular data via in-context learning, with no feature engineering or hyperparameter tuning.

See also

Useful links:

  • https://github.com/mattyoreilly/tabfm

  • Report bugs at https://github.com/mattyoreilly/tabfm/issues
